title: The Defensive Roll
prompt: Low-angle shot across the seafloor. A lone trilobite senses motion, its antennae twitching. As an anomalocaris cruises into frame above it, the trilobite curls its segmented body into a tight defensive ball, calcified shell facing outward. The predator circles once, probes the armored sphere with its grasping appendages, then drifts on. The trilobite holds, frozen, until the threat passes.
